rows.label: tev031401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev031401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Luldeyu about his shop.

rows.label: tev031401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev031401_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Luldeyu if he's heard
any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev031401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Luldeyu about the Growth attack.

rows.label: tev031401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Luldeyu about the Zu Pharg.

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0001
rows.name:
I think I need more stimulation, you know?
It's really rather boring out here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Well, I decided to open up a
repair shop since I enjoy
tinkering with things, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0003
rows.name:
And I wanted to open it in
Armory Alley, but the rent
there is is just obscene...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Instead I opened this location, since
the rent was zero. But you know what
else is zero here? Customers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Maybe someday I'll be lucky enough
to have a fascinating xeno or two
wander by and talk to me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0010
rows.name:
While I was in Valley of Oblivion,
I was monitoring lifeforms in
various places, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0011
rows.name:
I also picked up a couple of very interesting
signatures in the region where this city is.
I think you call it Primordial Wilderness?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0012
rows.name:
One of the lifeforms is clearly
human, but the other... Well, I
guess I don't really know what it is?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Still, if you place enough data probes,
maybe you can stumble upon it yourself?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0020
rows.name:
I saw Qmoevas and puges and pugiliths...
Goodness me, don't the Growth have
so many marvelous weapons?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0021
rows.name:
I should have snuck onto the battlefield with the
BLADEs instead of taking cover on that blasted ship,
right? Now I'll never get a closer look at them![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0022
rows.name:
Er, why are you looking at me like that?
You don't think I'm just trying to
satisfy some sick curiosity, do you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0023
rows.name:
We need to...uh...to KNOW our enemy in order
to vanquish them, right? So I was just trying
to do a little field reconnaissance?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0030
rows.name:
I'm glad you asked, because I was
hoping for a chance to maybe talk
someone's ear off about it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0031
rows.name:
Frankly, it's shocking they have the the
technology to keep an object of that size
floating in place, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0032
rows.name:
And did I even mention the weaponry it was
equipped with? Goodness, but when the Growth
get serious, we'd all better watch out...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0033
rows.name:
Still, wouldn't you think its size works
directly against its mobility? So I
guess that means it's not perfect?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Luldeyu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev031401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Luldeyu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0201
rows.name:
Well, um...Troylan won't
stop sending me voltant?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0202
rows.name:
I think someone gave him the idea that
I'm in love with the stuff somehow?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0203
rows.name:
I'm almost neck-deep in voltant at this
point! What am I going to to to do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0204
rows.name:
I know I caused my share of trouble,
and I do want to make it up to
Chiromil, you know? But still...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031401_MSG0205
rows.name:
At this rate, I'll be buried so so deep
in voltant that I fear no one will know
where it ends and I begin, right?[ST:wait ]
